title: Update auth tests and fix bud man page
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

We were missing -q in the bud man page for quiet.  While discussing testing of authentication with the QE folks, realized a few tweaks were needed to the authentication test script, mostly bad password stuff.  While in there touched up some comments for easier use.

comments.body: The test script is used only "by hand" and is not part of our CI tests.  This in effect is a doc update only.

:pushpin: Commit eb1b807 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan eb1b8076fe57a4e70c5f187ae25fdc72536e46d8 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
